linting.notes: helm lint validates Helm chart syntax and structure. helm-docs validates that chart README is up to date with values.yaml. Both are gating in CI.

testing.mock_patterns: Test files use YAML assertions to validate rendered Helm templates
testing.notes: 52 unit tests across 9 test suites validate chart rendering with various configurations. Tests use helm-unittest plugin with YAML-based assertions.

ci.notes: validate.yaml runs on PRs that change charts/. test.yaml runs on all PRs and push to main. Both are gating. release.yaml publishes to GitHub Container Registry and creates GitHub releases when Chart.yaml version changes.

build.notes: Helm chart depends on postgresql, clickhouse, valkey (redis), minio (s3), and common charts from Bitnami. Dependencies are downloaded from OCI registry.

conventions.test_naming: Test suites are YAML files with 'suite' and 'tests' keys. Each test has 'it' description and 'asserts' array.
conventions.notes: Helm chart follows standard Helm best practices. Templates are in charts/langfuse/templates/. Values files use nested structure with component-specific sections (langfuse, postgresql, clickhouse, redis, s3).

setup_commands: apk add --no-cache wget git bash curl

lint_commands.notes: Exit code 0, output: '1 chart(s) linted, 0 chart(s) failed'

test_commands.notes: Exit code 0, 52 tests passed in 9 test suites, completed in 2.78s

container_recipe.notes: helm-docs validation skipped in Alpine container due to glibc incompatibility, but works in Ubuntu-based CI. All other commands validated successfully.
